description_long: This object is a delicate flowering plant with several large, showy blooms and unopened buds arranged along a slender, dark stem. The flowers are characterized by broad, rounded petals with a soft lavender to pinkish hue, accented by darker purple veins and a prominent magenta and white central column. The unopened buds are oval and display a gradient from greenish-yellow to brown. The stem is thin, dark, and slightly curved, supporting the flowers and buds in a natural, cascading arrangement. No pot or container is visible in the images, suggesting the focus is solely on the plant itself. The overall appearance is elegant and ornamental, typical of a decorative indoor plant.
description: A flowering plant with large, lavender-pink blooms and unopened buds on a slender, dark stem. The flowers are showy and detailed, with prominent veining and a magenta center.
description_view_0: Two large, open flowers with detailed veining and a magenta center are visible, along with several unopened buds on a dark stem.
description_view_1: The view highlights the cluster of unopened buds and a partially visible flower, emphasizing the plant's three-dimensional structure.
description_view_2: The back of the flowers is visible, showing the pale lavender-pink petals and the arrangement of buds along the stem.
description_view_3: A side view reveals the overlapping petals and the alignment of buds and flowers along the curved stem.
